About

My career sits at an unlikely intersection: advertising agency hustle and healthcare client work — plus a genuine love for storytelling through journalism, photography, and online community. I've managed multi-channel campaigns, created social-first content, and turned analytics into strategies that actually shape what comes next.

Now I'm looking to bring that same curiosity and range somewhere the community is the product.

Photography

Campaign work

Prudential Hong Kong

100% Doraemon & Friends Exhibition — Title Sponsorship Campaign

Integrated OOH & Social Campaign  ·  Hong Kong  ·  2024  ·  3 months

OOH Social media IP partnership Event activation

Overview

Prudential was the title sponsor of the "100% Doraemon & Friends" exhibition in Hong Kong — a major IP event celebrating the beloved character's centennial. The campaign ran across three months with integrated online and offline touchpoints, bringing the Prudential brand into a high-footfall cultural moment.

My role

Supported campaign execution across OOH placement coordination, social media content, and client deliverables. Contributed to managing campaign assets across multiple formats — from bus shelter wraps in high-traffic Hong Kong streets to social posts supporting the exhibition launch.

Highlights

  • OOH placements across key Hong Kong locations including Tsim Sha Tsui bus shelters — visible day and night
  • Drone show activation at the Victoria Harbour waterfront as part of the launch event
  • Facebook post from the drone show activation reached 5.9K likes, 672 shares, and 150 comments
  • Campaign bridged Prudential's financial services identity with an emotionally resonant IP — Doraemon's 100th anniversary

Journalism & editorial

Broadcast News Network (BNN)

Student Journalist — Reporter, Anchor, Producer, Editor

University News Platform · Hong Kong · Year 2–3

Video reportingLive anchorDocumentaryFilming & editing

Overview

All Year 3 journalism students run BNN — a live student news platform covering Hong Kong society, politics, and culture. Responsibilities spanned the full pipeline: story pitching, interviewing, filming, voiceover, editing, and live anchoring.

Featured work

  • Documentary — Same-sex marriage in Hong Kong
    Explores remote wedding options available to LGBT couples in HK and the prejudice they face on the road toward equality.
    ▶ Watch documentary →
  • Female urinal design innovation — A local resident's solution to restroom queues
    ▶ Watch report →
  • LeaveHomeSafe accessibility barriers — Visually impaired communities criticise mandatory QR policy
    ▶ Watch report →

Fan & community — @dualipa.cavan

Building a community around an artist I love.

I run a Dua Lipa fan account on Instagram, creating and editing reels, curating content, and growing a genuinely engaged community from scratch. Every post is a small exercise in content strategy — what hooks, what resonates, what makes people stop scrolling.
